notes: Identity-image archetype: circular/square image container with fallback initials or icon. 10-density sizing (micro...ultra). 6 semantic roles (brand/info/danger/success/warning/neutral) supply container + text color.

10-density sizing ladder: micro/tiny/small/base/medium/large/big/huge/mega/ultra. Each density sets size (w=h), radius, font-size (for initials), icon-size, and avatar-group stacking offset. COMP-SIZE eligible for Figma multi-mode binding.
Variant-less: no filled/outlined/soft — role color is background + text. All role variants are uniform (tinted bg from container palette).
Shape variants: circle (default, radius-full) and square (radius-0). Orthogonal to density and role.
Avatar Group: stacked avatars with negative offset (overlapping). Offset is per-density to maintain proportional spacing.
Ring: optional online/status ring (2px border) atop avatar. Not per-density; fixed 2px width with surface-base-bg (consistent across sizes).
No AA on-component needed: avatar is image OR short initials. If initials, role bg + text is user-chosen (designer/brand), not auto-derived.
